item.title: Download MultiSendcon 3.2.4
item.description: MultiSendcon is a special Exchange Send Connector that allows you to use different smart servers (SMTP forwarding servers) for different *sender* domains. It distributes emails sent from Exchange to separate smart SMTP servers using different login credentials (SMTP authentication username and password) based on the sender's address. Applications for: Store emails for two or more companies on the same Exchange server and send emails to two domains through different web service...
